title: Restaurant Menu Video Recording
brief: I need a freelancer to create videos of food items for a restaurant menu. The items to be recorded are food items, and they should be categorized into appetizers, main courses, and desserts. Requirements: - Record short, high-quality videos of each food item - Categorize videos into appetizers, main courses, and desserts Ideal Skills and Experience: - Experience in food photography/videography - Ability to create engaging and visually appealing food videos - Attention to detail and creativity Please provide samples of previous work.
